name: Slack Notifications
description: Post notifications to Slack when tickets are created, resolved, or SLA is breached. Keep your team in the loop with real-time alerts.
author: CLIaaS

actions.name: Send Slack Notification
actions.description: Manually send a notification about this ticket to Slack

notifyOnCreate.description: Notify when a ticket is created

notifyOnResolve.description: Notify when a ticket is resolved
